summary: Comprehensive Phase 2 end-to-end testing completed for Yeşil Dükkan. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100% after İyzico URL fix). Frontend: All core flows working - home page, category filters, product detail, cart, login, admin dashboard, admin AI add UI, mobile responsive. Turkish content consistent throughout.

fixed_bugs.issue: İyzico base_url included protocol (https://) causing 'nonnumeric port' error
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Removed https:// protocol from IYZICO_BASE_URL in .env and payment_service.py default

passed_tests: Backend: Health check (GET /api/)
Backend: Taxonomy endpoint (GET /api/taxonomy)
Backend: All landing pages (kaktusler, kolay-bakim, pet-friendly)
Backend: Product listing with filters and sorting
Backend: Featured products
Backend: Product by slug with related products
Backend: User registration and login (admin + customer)
Backend: Auth /me endpoint with token
Backend: Invalid credentials return 401
Backend: Admin AI analyze - token auth (401 without token, 403 with customer token)
Backend: Admin products list, stats, orders (with admin token)
Backend: Unauthorized admin access returns 401/403
Backend: Checkout creates order and returns İyzico payment_url
Backend: Get order by ID
Backend: Sitemap.xml and robots.txt
Frontend: Home page loads with hero, 9-category grid, featured products, SEO landing strip
Frontend: Header with logo, search, cart icon
Frontend: Category page with breadcrumb, product count, product grid
Frontend: Filters (care, light, water, size, pet-safe) work correctly
Frontend: Sorting (newest, price asc/desc, name) works
Frontend: Product detail page with gallery, price, quantity controls, tabs, related products
Frontend: Add to cart opens drawer with correct quantity and total
Frontend: Cart drawer shows items, quantity controls, subtotal
Frontend: Login page with admin credentials redirects to /admin
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows KPI cards (products, orders, revenue)
Frontend: Admin AI Add page shows upload area, analyze button (disabled without file)
Frontend: Admin Products page lists 4 demo products with images
Frontend: Mobile responsive (390px) - home, category, product pages render correctly

additional_notes.ai_integration: AI analyze endpoint auth tested only (no real PlantNet/Mistral calls as instructed - expensive)
additional_notes.payment_integration: İyzico sandbox integration working - payment_url returned correctly. Did NOT complete actual payment as instructed.
additional_notes.email_integration: Resend email service configured (warning in logs about test email restrictions - expected for sandbox)
additional_notes.demo_products: 4 products seeded: Fil Çalısı, Deve Tabanı, Mavi Sütun Kaktüs, Dantel Aloe
additional_notes.turkish_content: All UI text in Turkish, consistent throughout application
additional_notes.seo: Landing pages, sitemap.xml, robots.txt all working correctly
additional_notes.theme: Green/white theme with 10px border-radius applied consistently
